members.name: Christie Yuling Chang
members.card: Taiwanese scholar and longtime Sakyadhita leader.
members.bio: Christie Yuling Chang is a Taiwanese Buddhist scholar who has served Sakyadhita in several leadership roles, including as President during the 2009–2013 term.

members.name: Paula Arai
members.card: Scholar of Japanese Buddhism and women's ritual.
members.bio: Paula Arai is a scholar of Japanese Buddhism whose work focuses on Buddhist women, ritual, and healing. She served as Vice President on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee during the 2009–2013 term.

members.name: Melissa Vincenty
members.bio: Melissa Vincenty served as Secretary on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee during the 2009–2013 term.

members.name: Maria Arroyo
members.card: Served on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee.
members.bio: Maria Arroyo served as Treasurer on the Sakyadhita Executive Committee during the 2009–2013 term.
